GeneralDescription.SourceString: Engineering perfection with a mysterious twist.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Engineering perfection with a mysterious twist.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Jules is the daughter of an international crime boss who refuses to live in her dad's shadow. Left to fend for herself, she learned how to rebuild the world the way she wanted to see it and is on track to be one of the greatest inventors of all time.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Jules is the daughter of an international crime boss who refuses to live in her dad's shadow. Left to fend for herself, she learned how to rebuild the world the way she wanted to see it and is on track to be one of the greatest inventors of all time.
